nits: verify.log deviates from the plan's literal grep on shared/dist/index.d.ts; uses recursive grep across dist/ because the package uses a barrel-re-export pattern. Deviation documented in verify.log.
Field names use snake_case (recipient_or_key, content_hash, latency_ms) per the do-block spec, while sibling schemas in recording.ts use camelCase. Spec wins, but cross-module style is inconsistent.
error.message allows empty string while error.code requires min(1). Asymmetric validation; not required by spec.
No new ./activity subpath export in shared/package.json (recording and tools have subpath exports). Root entry suffices.
